GLADIUS-DRAGON_AURA_POWER.description:
Increases Attack damage by 20% per [gold]Dragon Aura[/gold].
Lose 1 [gold]Dragon Aura[/gold] whenever you play an Attack or at the end of your turn.
GLADIUS-DRAGON_AURA_POWER.smartDescripti:
Increases Attack damage by [blue]{TotalBonus}%[/blue].
Lose 1 [gold]Dragon Aura[/gold] whenever you play an Attack or at the end of your turn.
GLADIUS-DRAGON_AURA_POWER.title: Dragon Aura
GLADIUS-DRAGON_AURA_NEXT_TURN_POWER.desc: At the start of your next turn, Gain [gold]Dragon Aura[/gold].
GLADIUS-DRAGON_AURA_NEXT_TURN_POWER.smar: At the start of your next turn, Gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Dragon Aura[/gold].
GLADIUS-ERUPTION_POWER.description: Lose All [gold]Dragon Aura[/gold] at the end of your turn.
GLADIUS-ERUPTION_POWER.smartDescription: Lose All [gold]Dragon Aura[/gold] at the end of your turn.
GLADIUS-ERUPTION_POWER.title: Eruption
GLADIUS-PRESERVE_DURABILITY_POWER.descri: Your next Artifact does not decrease Durability this turn.
GLADIUS-PRESERVE_DURABILITY_POWER.smartD: Your next {Amount:plural:Artifact is|[blue]{}[/blue] Artifacts are} does not decrease Durability this turn.
GLADIUS-PRESERVE_DURABILITY_POWER.title: Preserve Durability
GLADIUS-UNITY_POWER.description: The next time you gain [gold]Block[/gold] from a card, increase the amount gained.
GLADIUS-UNITY_POWER.smartDescription: The next time {OnPlayer:you gain|[gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] gains} [gold]Block[/gold] from a card, increase the amount gained by [blue]{Amount}[/blue]%.
GLADIUS-UNITY_POWER.title: Unity
GLADIUS-COLLECTION_POWER.description: Whenever you discard a card, gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
GLADIUS-COLLECTION_POWER.smartDescriptio: Whenever you discard a card, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Block[/gold].
GLADIUS-COLLECTION_POWER.title: Collection
GLADIUS-SLAG_EXPLOSION_POWER.description: Whenever you [gold]Alchemy[/gold], deal [blue]6[/blue] damage a random enemy.
GLADIUS-SLAG_EXPLOSION_POWER.smartDescri: Whenever you [gold]Alchemy[/gold], deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage a random enemy.
GLADIUS-SLAG_EXPLOSION_POWER.title: Slag Explosion
GLADIUS-GRINDING_POWER.description: Whenever you [gold]Alchemy[/gold] an unenchanted [gold]Artifact[/gold] card, Enchant it with [blue]3[/blue] [purple]Sharp[/purple].
GLADIUS-GRINDING_POWER.smartDescription: Whenever you [gold]Alchemy[/gold] an unenchanted [gold]Artifact[/gold] card, Enchant it with [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [purple]Sharp[/purple].
GLADIUS-GRINDING_POWER.title: Grinding
GLADIUS-DRAGONS_PROTECTION_POWER.descrip: Whenever you play an Attack card, gain 2 Block for each [gold]Dragon Aura[/gold].
GLADIUS-DRAGONS_PROTECTION_POWER.smartDe: Whenever you play an Attack card, gain {Amount} Block for each [gold]Dragon Aura[/gold].
GLADIUS-DRAGONS_PROTECTION_POWER.title: Dragon's Protection
GLADIUS-BREATH_OF_FIRE_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Dragon Aura[/gold].
GLADIUS-BREATH_OF_FIRE_POWER.smartDescri: At the start of your turn, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Dragon Aura[/gold].
GLADIUS-BREATH_OF_FIRE_POWER.title: Breath of Fire
GLADIUS-THUNDER_CLOUD_POWER.description: At the end of your turn, [gold]Transform[/gold] up to 1 card into [gold]Thunderstruck Wood[/gold] in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
GLADIUS-THUNDER_CLOUD_POWER.smartDescrip: At the end of your turn, [gold]Transform[/gold] up to {Amount} {Amount:plural:card|cards} into [gold]Thunderstruck Wood[/gold] in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
GLADIUS-THUNDER_CLOUD_POWER.title: Thunder Cloud
GLADIUS-THUNDER_CLOUD_POWER_UPGRADED.des: At the end of your turn, [gold]Transform[/gold] up to 1 card into [gold]Thunderstruck Wood+[/gold] in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
GLADIUS-THUNDER_CLOUD_POWER_UPGRADED.sma: At the end of your turn, [gold]Transform[/gold] up to {Amount} {Amount:plural:card|cards} into [gold]Thunderstruck Wood+[/gold] in your [gold]Hand[/gold].
GLADIUS-KNEAD_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, Add a [gold]Clay[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
GLADIUS-KNEAD_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, Add a [gold]Clay[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].

GLADIUS-MASTERS_REACH_POWER.description: The first [gold]Durable[/gold] card you play each turn [gold]Durability[/gold] is not consumed.
GLADIUS-MASTERS_REACH_POWER.smartDescrip: The first [gold]Durable[/gold] card you play each turn [gold]Durability[/gold] is not consumed.
GLADIUS-MASTERS_REACH_POWER.title: Master's Reach
GLADIUS-CONCUSSION_POWER.description:
The first time you attack an enemy each turn, if it intends to attack, apply 1 [gold]Weak[/gold].
Otherwise, apply 1 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
GLADIUS-CONCUSSION_POWER.smartDescriptio:
The first time you attack an enemy each turn, if it intends to attack, apply {Amount} [gold]Weak[/gold].
Otherwise, apply {Amount} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
GLADIUS-CONCUSSION_POWER.title: Concussion
GLADIUS-CULLING_POWER.description: At the start of your turn, discard 1 card from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and draw cards equal to their cost.
GLADIUS-CULLING_POWER.smartDescription: At the start of your turn, discard {Amount} {Amount:plural:card|cards} from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and draw cards equal to their cost.
GLADIUS-CULLING_POWER.title: Culling
